calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am:
Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.

6 related cases are related but are separately: 028189, *028191, 028194, 028196, 028198, 028199. Exhibits, will be entered under Case No. 028189 & Exhibits will be retained in that file until returned to parties.

Anna Levitan, official Russian Interpreter, appears with Mr. Lipson, to serve as translator for the appellants in all 6 related cases; Mr. Alec Berger serves as an informal Russian interpreter for the Respondents in all 6 related cases. Mr. Berger's wife, Nelly Merzhevitsky, is also present in court to assist.

10:15am - *028191:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Naftalieva Tatiana, appears in Pro Per; Appellant, Michael Nazlukhanyan, through counsel Kenneth A. Lipson. Parties and witnesses previously sworn, present their cases respectively, Respondent in the narrative, appellant through counsel. Judge Fleming questions parties.
10:35am
Matter is submitted
11:40am
All 6 matters are submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
